notes: Carl descends the entrance staircase into Floor 1. The system designates him Crawler #4,122 'Carl', race Human, Level 1 (he may re-pick race/class on Floor 3). A wall of entry achievements grants loot boxes he can't yet open. Both his pink Crocs fly off as he flees a goblin Murder Dozer; he kills a club-wielding goblin with his bare hands, reads the real Tutorial Guild sign, and talks his way inside past the guildmaster Mordecai.

set.location: World Dungeon — Floor 1 (entrance tunnels, near the Tutorial Guild)

add.name: Crazy Cat Lady
add.reward: You've received a Bronze Pet Box!
add.description: Entered the World Dungeon accompanied by a cat.

add.name: Trailblazing Crazy Cat Lady
add.reward: You've received a Legendary Pet Box!
add.description: First crawler ever to enter the World Dungeon accompanied by a cat.

add.name: Early Adopter
add.reward: You've received a Silver Adventurer Box!
add.description: One of the first 5,000 crawlers to enter a new World Dungeon.

add.name: Empty Pockets
add.reward: You've received a Bronze Adventurer Box!
add.description: Entered the dungeon without bringing any supplies.

add.name: Why Aren't You Wearing Pants?
add.reward: You've received a Gold Apparel Box!
add.description: Entered the dungeon wearing no pants.

add.name: Unarmed Combat
add.reward: You've received a Bronze Weapon Box!
add.description: Entered the dungeon without bringing a weapon.

add.name: Loner
add.description: Entered the dungeon without any human companions.

add.name: Fall Into an Obvious Trap
add.description: Walked into an obvious trap — the goblin Murder Dozer ambush down the 'Da Tutorial Guild' alley.

add.name: Discovered and Read an Official Dungeon Sign
add.reward: All official dungeon signage is now highlighted and easier to spot; nearby guilds appear on your minimap.
add.description: Read the genuine 'Tutorial Guild' sign painted on the wall.

add.name: You've Inflicted Damage on a Mob
add.description: First damage dealt to a mob (a goblin at the guild door).

add.name: You've Killed an Armed Mob With Your Bare Hands!
add.reward: You've received a Bronze Weapon Box!
add.description: Beat a club-wielding goblin unconscious with his fists, then smashed its head against the stones.

add.name: Mordecai
add.note: Rat Hooligan, Level 50. A Non-Combatant NPC and former crawler (reached Floor 11). Runs this tutorial guildhall and, reluctantly, lets Carl in to escape the goblins.

update.note: Designated Crawler #4,119 'Princess Donut', Level 1, Race: Cat, Class: not yet assigned. Auto-grouped with Carl into a party of two on entering the dungeon; she can see the game HUD too.

sources.quote: You have been designated Crawler Number 4,122. You have been assigned the Crawler Name “Carl.” You are assigned the race of Human. You are currently level 1. You may choose a new race and class as soon as you descend to the third floor.

Congratulations! You’ve earned your first achievement: Crazy Cat Lady. ... Reward: You’ve received a Bronze Pet Box! ... Reward: You’ve received a Legendary Pet Box! ... Reward: You’ve received a Silver Adventurer Box! ... Reward: You’ve received a Bronze Adventurer Box! ... Reward: You’ve received a Gold Apparel Box! ... Reward: You’ve received a Bronze Weapon Box! ... Reward: None! Haha. You are so dead.
Both of my pink Crocs went flying as I turned down the main tunnel, heading away from where I’d come down the stairs.
“Nobody tells old Mordecai anything!” ... Mordecai – Rat Hooligan. Level 50. Guildmaster of this guildhall. This is a Non-Combatant NPC.
Crawler #4,119. “Princess Donut.” Level 1. Race: Cat. Class: Not yet assigned.
